title: Functional design documents for work items

steps.description: Database: add functional_doc_path/content/search columns to work_items, FUNCTIONAL_DOC_FTS_FUNCTION_SQL/TRIGGER_SQL constants, Alembic migration (up + down + GIN index), and testcontainer FTS install
Backend: iw register auto-detects sibling <ID>_Functional.md (plus --functional-doc override); scripts/backfill_functional_doc.py gains --load-db flag that UPDATEs the new DB columns

Template + skills: new Functional_Design_Template.md (ai-dev/templates + templates/design); iw-new-feature/incident/cr skills generate <ID>_Functional.md; iw-review-design validates structural (blocking) and content (warning) checks

Frontend: dashboard item detail gets a new Functional Design tab — route in routers/items.py, fragment item_functional_doc.html, tab button placed immediately after Design Document in item_detail.html

Tests: integration coverage of FTS trigger, register-time auto-detect + override, dashboard tab route (content + empty + fallback + 404); unit coverage of backfill --load-db branches and iw-review-design validator regex set

Final cross-layer review: DB/ORM symmetry vs design_doc_*, register + backfill correctness, skill checklist completeness, UI tab placement, Boundary Behavior + Invariant coverage, no regressions to design_doc path
QV: Browser verification — Functional Design tab renders for populated items, empty-state for null content, Design Document tab unchanged, no regressions on sibling tabs
